full_text:
Meng Xing еӯҹиҲҲ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Xing (еӯҹиҲҲ). Was not killed with his father, Meng Da. Meng Xing was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
